llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Assistant Manager, Technical Development
job.description: Objectives of the Position • Provide Technical Advisory at respective region through the area of part design, processing, tooling and material in order to achieve manufacturing excellent part performance quality at customers in our Engineering Plastics business. • To optimize product/material processing under trouble shooting at customer location to target excellent part quality. • According to the agreed strategies, policies and practices, provides input and participates in business development and planning, product / processing development and modification, customer intimacy to support the implementation of sales strategies and policies in China at defined sales goal. • Support Application Development and Product Launch initiatives in South China for Engineering Plastics together with commercial team in Project Acquisition and Commercialization for sales Growth. How You Will Do It Market Development • Supports in running projects efficiently and gets the active projects be commercialized. • Advocates in country and regional technical meetings. • Promotes and maintains Market Development through frequent updates on market development activities, and application technologies. • Tracks the competitive technology in the market. Initiates sample/performance and ensures broad technical knowledge of competition, including competitive literature. • Working closely with key strategy accounts and engaging with Customers and Strategic Key Accounts identifying material needs leading to material development through ‘PHASEGATE’ or ‘TOPIC’ closely with Country TD, Regional TD, KAM, Product Developer (R D). • Support material validation in the development material projects through processing and part testing to identify the properties gap for improvement toward product success. • Joint effort in product launch with Regional Tech Dev Team toward success. Segment strategy • Collaborates with marketing team to build the road map of each segment of consumer electronics, new energy and automotive, also implementing the road map to contribute the business development • Supports in the development of the regional / global product/ segment strategy, in alignment with Sales and Product Management. Project management • Supports technical projects/activities and ensures good progress of these projects, by assigning appropriate expertise and using effective project management approach.
